articles.author: Bridget McArthur
articles.title: Australian cricket great Damien Martyn awakes from induced coma after falling ill with meningitis
articles.description: Former Australian Test batsman Damien Martyn is awake and talking after being in an induced coma for several days.
articles.content:
Australian cricket great Damien Martyn has woken up from an induced coma after falling ill with meningitis an infection that causes swelling around the brain. 
The 54-year-old former Test batsman wa… [+1953 chars]

articles.title: What we learned from watching the 1992 World Cup final in full again | ESPNcricinfo.com
articles.description: Wides, lbw calls, swing - plenty of things were different in white-ball cricket back then | ESPNcricinfo.com
articles.content: Last week, we at ESPNcricinfo did something we have been thinking of doing for eight years now: pretend-live ball-by-ball commentary for a classic cricket match. We knew the result, yes, but we tried… [+6823 chars]
